user.title: CozyLife Local Setup
user.description:
Configure your CozyLife smart devices locally over Wi-Fi.

• **Auto-Discovery**: Leave the **IP address** empty and submit to scan your local network.
• **Manual Provisioning**: Enter a single **IP address** to add a specific device directly.
• **Battery Environmental Sensors**: If adding a sleeping sensor, enter its static IP and check **Sleeping temp/humidity sensor**.

data_description.ip_address: Static IP address of your device (e.g. 192.168.1.150). Recommended to set a DHCP reservation in your router.
data_description.network_cidr: Subnet to scan during discovery. Use 'auto' to scan the default local network interface or a CIDR range (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24).
data_description.sleeping_sensor: Check this ONLY for battery-powered sensors. Caches metadata so Home Assistant builds entities without waiting for the sleeping hardware to wake up.
data_description.skip_validation: Skip active network handshake. Recommended only for remote environments, mock tests, or when adding an offline device.
data_description.min_kelvin: The warmest light color temperature supported by your bulb hardware (typical range: 2000K to 2700K).
data_description.max_kelvin: The coolest light color temperature supported by your bulb hardware (typical range: 5000K to 6500K).
data_description.experimental_short_interval: Allow 600s / 10m updates on compatible sleeping-sensor firmware. The standard firmware interval is 1800s / 30m. Some wake cycles may still fall back to 1800s.
data_description.report_interval: Interval at which the environment sensor wakes and transmits readings. Standard mode uses at least 1800s / 30m. Experimental mode allows 600s / 10m, with occasional firmware fallback to 1800s.

select_device.title: Discovered Devices
select_device.description: Discovered **{count}** CozyLife local device(s) on your subnet. Select the device you want to add to Home Assistant below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to establish a local connection with the device on port 5555. Verify the IP address, check power, and ensure no firewalls or AP isolation settings are blocking the port.
error.invalid_ip: Please enter a valid IPv4 address (e.g., 192.168.1.50).
error.invalid_network: Please enter a valid IPv4 network CIDR (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24) or use the keyword 'auto'.
error.ip_required_for_sleeping_sensor: A single, static IP address is required when manually provisioning a sleeping battery sensor.
error.ip_required_for_skip_validation: A single, static IP address is required when bypass validation (Developer Mode) is enabled.
error.network_too_large: The specified subnet range is too large to scan. Please restrict your scan to a /24 network (256 hosts) or smaller.
error.no_devices_found: No online CozyLife devices were detected on the network. Check your device's power, Wi-Fi connection, and ensure it is on the same subnet as Home Assistant.
error.no_network: Home Assistant could not automatically detect an active local network interface. Please specify a CIDR range manually.
error.timeout_connect: The connection attempt to the device timed out. Check network response times or router settings.
error.unknown: An unexpected system error occurred during device handshake. Please check your Home Assistant system logs.

abort.already_configured: This CozyLife device is already configured in Home Assistant.

init.title: CozyLife Device Options
init.description: Tune local parameters, report windows, and logging options for this CozyLife device.

data_description.enable_debug: Streams complete local packet handshakes to Home Assistant logs. Extremely helpful for troubleshooting unrecognized device models.
data_description.experimental_short_interval: Allow 600s / 10m updates on compatible sleeping-sensor firmware. The standard firmware interval is 1800s / 30m. Some wake cycles may still fall back to 1800s.
data_description.humidity_sensitivity: Only report humidity updates when the value shifts by this threshold (5 represents 0.5% humidity delta).
data_description.temp_sensitivity: Only report temperature updates when the value shifts by this threshold (5 represents 0.5°C temperature delta).
data_description.report_interval: The wake interval in seconds for environmental sensors. Standard mode uses at least 1800s / 30m. Experimental mode allows 600s / 10m, with occasional firmware fallback to 1800s.
data_description.min_kelvin: Adjust the warmest color temperature limit (Kelvin) for this light bulb.
data_description.max_kelvin: Adjust the coolest color temperature limit (Kelvin) for this light bulb.
